_comment: Accessory/bundle packs whose element-level contents ship in data/packs.json (round-1 feedback 3a/3b): the xtra line (2018-21), the VIP Add-On packs (2021-23, xtra successor), 40320 promo greenery, 6318 classic accessories, plus track packs and road-plate packs. Sets not already in the included themes are pulled into the catalog by this allowlist.
